issue_title: fix: prevent ToolbarIconButton text truncation in mobile toolbar
issue_body_preview:
## Issue

- resolve: https://github.com/route06/liam-internal/issues/5476

## Why is this change needed?

The `ToolbarIconButton` components in the mobile toolbar were appearing collapsed/truncated when they contained text content ("Zoom in", "Zoom out"). This was caused by the IconButton comp
test_description_zh: 在移动端视口下打开页面，观察工具栏中包含文字的按钮（如 'Zoom in'、'Zoom out'）的显示情况，检查按钮文字是否完整显示，按钮尺寸是否正常。
expected_result_zh: 移动端工具栏中的 ToolbarIconButton 按钮文字（如 'Zoom in'、'Zoom out'）应完整显示，不出现文字截断或按钮被压缩/折叠的现象，按钮保持正常尺寸和可读性。
